The '''S-250 ''Chela''-class starfighter''' was a craft used by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Republic Navy/Legends|fleet]] at many battles, including the [[Battle of Rakata Prime]] in [[3956 BBY]].<ref name="SW:KOTOR" /> Though a loser in the "Generation Tomorrow Starfighter" competition, it was still purchased in small numbers by the Republic.

==Characteristics==
[[File:Centurion_and_Chelas.jpg|thumb|left|250px|A wing of S-250 Chela-class starfighter attacks a [[Centurion-class battlecruiser/Legends|''Centurion''-class battlecruiser]]]]
These [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] were armed with twin [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] and [[Missile launcher/Legends|missile launchers]], and flew alongside the more nimble [[Aurek-class tactical strikefighter|''Aurek''-class tactical strikefighters]] in some battles.<ref name="SW:KOTOR" /> Ships of this type were seen leading [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] starfighter [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] into battle, and often were flown by higher-ranking [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] and [[Squad/Legends|squad]] leaders.
